mapper.select: SELECT p.*, pg.name AS group_name FROM plan p LEFT JOIN plan_group pg ON p.group_id = pg.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.is_deleted = 0
SELECT p.*, pg.name AS group_name FROM plan p LEFT JOIN plan_group pg ON p.group_id = pg.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.group_id = #{groupId} AND p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, pg.name AS group_name FROM plan p LEFT JOIN plan_group pg ON p.group_id = pg.id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plan (user_id, group_id, title, description, target_body_part, difficulty_level, train_days, is_public, share_code) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{targetBodyPart}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{trainDays}, #{isPublic}, #{shareCode})
mapper.update: UPDATE plan SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE plan SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
